problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Shape. Shape memory alloy phase transition directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
